problem: Clinical trials suffer from long start-up times, enrollment delays, protocol complexity, and increased site burden that slow drug development.
solution: ClinSphere integrated ecosystem with AI-powered Trial IntelX for predictive trial planning, eReview Manager for IRB workflows, Total Training for end-to-end clinical trial training, and Study Accelerator connecting site identification, ethical review, and recruitment. Largest protocol dataset (80k+) in the industry.
